title: Create: Engineer's Construct
description: The ultimate compatibility addon for Create and Tinker's Construct!
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Zva-UxUSang" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
About:

An addon for Create and Tinker's Construct. This mod increases the ways in which the mods interact with each other.

There are many new recipes that bring the mods together, as well as a few new features.



Features:

The Mechanical Furnace: a block capable of powering a Smeltery or Foundry with Rotational Force.

Molten materials: There are a few new molten materials, allowing the player to alloy Rose Quartz and Andesite Alloy.

Recipes: Dozens of recipes connecting the mods.

Tinker's modifiers: The Creative modifier. When applied to tools, the tool acts like a Wrench.



Discord:

Join it here! This discord is shared with Create: Broken Bad and my other projects.



Started November 6, 2022
